sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57915" key="klimaki/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῑμᾰκ-ίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n57915.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλιμάκιον</ref></xr>, cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0403.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Amips.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
